note: Key values match browser event.key (uppercase letters, special keys by name).
note_zy: Z and Y are always treated as equivalent — handles QWERTY/QWERTZ confusion.
note_colon: Position uses ':' — on QWERTY: Shift+; — on QWERTZ: Shift+. — both produce event.key ':' so no special handling needed.

contexts.none: No unit selected — show prompt text only
contexts.factory: Show a random T1 factory from the selected faction(s)
contexts.builder: Show a random constructor/builder from the selected faction(s)
contexts.rezbot: Show a Rezbot (ARM: Eraser / COR: Resurrector / LEG: equivalent)
contexts.transport: Show a transport plane from the selected faction(s)

shortcuts.label: Select Commander
shortcuts.description: Jump to and select your commander

shortcuts.label: Select All Same Type
shortcuts.description: Select every unit of the same type as the currently selected unit

shortcuts.label: Select All Same Type on Screen
shortcuts.description: Select all units of the same type visible on screen

shortcuts.label: Split Army
shortcuts.description: Split the selected group into two halves

shortcuts.label: Select Waiting Units
shortcuts.note: Y/Z interchangeable — QWERTY: Ctrl+Y, QWERTZ physical: Ctrl+Z
shortcuts.description: Select units that are waiting (hold fire etc.)

shortcuts.label: Select Idle Transports
shortcuts.description: Select transport planes/ships that have no orders

shortcuts.label: Attack
shortcuts.description: Order selected units to attack a target

shortcuts.label: Target Set
shortcuts.description: Set a manual fire target

shortcuts.label: Target Cancel
shortcuts.description: Clear the manual fire target

shortcuts.label: Fight
shortcuts.description: Move while engaging enemies along the way

shortcuts.label: Patrol
shortcuts.description: Patrol between current position and a target point

shortcuts.label: Guard
shortcuts.description: Follow and protect another unit

shortcuts.label: Reclaim
shortcuts.description: Reclaim a wreck or feature for metal

shortcuts.label: Repair
shortcuts.description: Repair a friendly unit or structure

shortcuts.label: Repeat
shortcuts.description: Toggle repeat orders in the queue

shortcuts.label: Stop
shortcuts.description: Clear all orders and stop the unit

shortcuts.label: Gather Wait
shortcuts.description: Wait at current position until a certain number of units gather

shortcuts.label: On / Off
shortcuts.description: Toggle unit active state (e.g. shields, cloak fields)

shortcuts.label: Stance
shortcuts.description: Cycle fire stance: Hold Fire → Fire at Will → Return Fire

shortcuts.label: Position
shortcuts.note: ':' — QWERTY: Shift+;  QWERTZ: Shift+.  Both produce ':' in the browser
shortcuts.description: Cycle movement stance: Hold Position → Maneuver → Roam

shortcuts.label: Cloak
shortcuts.description: Toggle cloaking on units that support it

shortcuts.label: D-Gun
shortcuts.description: Fire the commander's disintegrator gun

shortcuts.label: Capture
shortcuts.description: Capture an enemy unit or structure

shortcuts.label: Show Pathing
shortcuts.description: Toggle pathfinding debug overlay

shortcuts.label: Factory Cycle
shortcuts.description: Cycle through available build queues / factory modes

shortcuts.label: Factory Guard Toggle
shortcuts.description: Toggle whether newly built units guard the factory

shortcuts.label: Queue Next
shortcuts.description: Move to the next item in the build queue

shortcuts.label: Wait
shortcuts.note: Y/Z interchangeable — QWERTY: Y, QWERTZ physical: Z
shortcuts.description: Pause the unit until further orders

shortcuts.label: Self Destruct
shortcuts.description: Order the unit to self-destruct

shortcuts.label: Area MEX
shortcuts.note: Y/Z interchangeable — QWERTY: YY, QWERTZ physical: ZZ
shortcuts.description: Place metal extractors on all available spots in a dragged area

shortcuts.label: Place Blueprint
shortcuts.description: Place a blueprint for a structure to be built later

shortcuts.label: Next Blueprint
shortcuts.note: QWERTY: Alt+]  QWERTZ: Alt++ (same physical key; normalised in trainer)
shortcuts.description: Cycle to the next blueprint in your list

shortcuts.label: Resurrect
shortcuts.description: Resurrect a destroyed unit from its wreck

shortcuts.label: Load
shortcuts.description: Order the transport to load nearby units

shortcuts.label: Unload
shortcuts.description: Drop transported units at a target location

shortcuts.label: Select Camera 1
shortcuts.description: Jump to stored camera position 1

shortcuts.label: Select Camera 2
shortcuts.description: Jump to stored camera position 2

shortcuts.label: Store Camera 1
shortcuts.description: Save the current camera position to slot 1

shortcuts.label: Store Camera 2
shortcuts.description: Save the current camera position to slot 2
